text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Students from the school Air Groove's mother
runs are attending Tracen's open house event
today, and I've been tasked with helping out.

text_block_list.name: Children
text_block_list.text:
Wow, this place is amazing! It's so big! The turf is
so green!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove's Mother
text_block_list.text:
Please settle down, everyone! And watch your
steps! We don't want any of you taking a tumble!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Excuse me, Trainer! Please keep an eye on the
children so nothing goes awry during the trial
lesson.

text_block_list.name: Tracen Academy Instructor
text_block_list.text:
...And it's important to replenish your body's
energy after a race by eating carbohydrates.
Banana and rice balls are good options for—

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Brrriiing!

text_block_list.name: Children
text_block_list.text:
Aaaah!
What's happening?!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: A-an alarm?!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Hello, security? I need you to confirm the
situation as soon as—

text_block_list.name: Children
text_block_list.text: Hey, what was that big sound?! I know! It was a huge fire blowing up and going bwoom!

text_block_list.name: Children
text_block_list.text: Huh?! You mean there's a fire?! This is bad! We need to get away! Run, everyone! Ugh, I'm scared... Sob, sob...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove's Mother
text_block_list.text:
One, two, three, eyes on me! ☆ It's moments like
these when you need to keep calm! Remain united
in spirit, and don't stray from the group.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove's Mother
text_block_list.text:
First, breathe deeply and release the tension from
your shoulders! Copy me now. Let's sway baaack
and fooorth. Baaack and fooorth.

text_block_list.name: Children
text_block_list.text: B-baaack... and fooorth...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Yes, I can hear you. I see... So it was the alarm
from the kitchen? We'll start evacuating from this
area just to be safe, then.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove's Mother
text_block_list.text: Okay, everyone! We're going outside now!
choice_data_list:
Let's file out starting from those closest to the
hallway.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
This way! We're following a route that takes us as
far from the kitchen as possible!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove's Mother
text_block_list.text:
Walk briskly, but no running! Mind the distance
between yourself and those around you! One,
two! One, two!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Air Groove takes the lead as soon as we start to
evacuate. Conversely, her mother watches over
the children from the rear.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Ngh... It's no good. This door is locked.

text_block_list.name: Children
text_block_list.text:
What?! Does that mean we can't get out?
Nooo! Let me out!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove's Mother
text_block_list.text:
Oh, really? But isn't this actually kind of fun? ♪
It's like we're explorers in a maze, searching for
the exit!

text_block_list.name: Children
text_block_list.text:
We're explorers? Ooh, okay! Let's look for the
exit!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Thanks to Air Groove and her mother working in
perfect harmony, we successfully evacuate the
building without incident.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
It appears that all the children are safely on their
way home. ...I'm truly glad that it was only an
alarm malfunction in the end, though.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Who could have imagined that their trial lesson
would become an evacuation drill?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove's Mother
text_block_list.text:
All's well that ends well! We were able to restart
the lesson once things calmed down, so I'm sure
the kids had a good time in the end!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
It was all thanks to your assistance, Mother.
And... you did well too, Trainer.
choice_data_list:
No, I think it was your perfect teamwork that
saved the day.

No, I think it was your perfect teamwork that
saved the day.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The fact of the matter is, if those two weren't
there, panic and chaos would've ensued, and the
evacuation wouldn't have been as smooth.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove's Mother
text_block_list.text: Hehe. We were in perfect sync, weren't we? We sure make a dynamic duo! ♪

text_block_list.name: Air Groove's Mother
text_block_list.text:
When we support one another, we help
accentuate the other's strong points! The two of
us can achieve anything as long as we work
together.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove's Mother
text_block_list.text:
I mean, we're the mother-daughter dream team!
Right, Air Groove?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: ...M-Mother! I'm honored to hear you say so!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove's Mother
text_block_list.text:
Come now, you're still talking like that?! Well,
whatever. That's just who you are!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Today, I got to witness the unconventional yet
wonderful relationship between Air Groove and
her mother.
